toc_content:
Requirements on ECU Resource Template
AUTOSAR CP Release 4.4.0
Table of Contents
1 Scope of this Document 5
1.1 Document Convention : 6
2 Related Documentation 7
2.1 Input Documents : 7
2.2 Specification Documents : 7
3 Requirements Tracing 8
4 Requirements 9
4.1 General Requirements : 9
[RS_ECUR_00005] Support configuration of Basic Software : 9
[RS_ECUR_00003] Describe characteristic properties of specific hard-
ware elements : 9
[RS_ECUR_00004] Describe generic hardware : 9
[RS_ECUR_00006] Describe connections between hardware elements 10
[RS_ECUR_00014] Timing properties of hardware : 10
[RS_ECUR_00015] Describe variability of the hardware : 11
[RS_ECUR_00017] Documentation Support : 11
[RS_ECUR_00018] Support hardware descriptions from several sources 11
4.2 Requirements to describe dedicated hardware : 12
[RS_ECUR_00007] Processing Unit specification : 12
[RS_ECUR_00008] Available memory : 12
[RS_ECUR_00009] Available communication means : 13
[RS_ECUR_00010] Available IO HW-Peripherals : 13
[RS_ECUR_00016] IO-HW-Abstraction specification : 14
[RS_ECUR_00011] Available sensors and actuators : 14
4.3 Requirements on the ECU Resource template development : 15
[RS_ECUR_00012] Development according to the AUTOSAR Generic
Structure Template document : 15
[RS_ECUR_00013] Transformation of ECU Resource template model-
ing according to the AUTOSAR XML Schema Production Rules 15
5 Change History 16
5.1 Change History for AUTOSAR 4.0.1 against 3.1.5 : 16
5.2 Change History for AUTOSAR 4.0.2 against 4.0.1 : 16
5.3 Change History for AUTOSAR 4.0.3 against 4.0.2 : 16

5.7 Change History for AUTOSAR 4.2.2 against 4.2.1 : 16
5.8 Change History for AUTOSAR 4.3.0 against 4.2.2 : 16
5.9 Change History for AUTOSAR 4.3.1 against 4.3.0 : 17
3 of 17
— AUTOSAR CONFIDENTIAL —Document ID 252: AUTOSAR_RS_ECUResourceTemplate
